creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As Wayne M. Barnes wrote:

> This section tantalizingly talks about an automated upgrade, but
> where is it?

In sysinstall's main menu.

>      Should I make world?  If so, what directory should I be in when
> I issue the command 'make world'?

/usr/src

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
